# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official base image
FROM ubuntu:latest

# Install necessary packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    redis-server \
    postgresql \
    curl

# Set environment variables for PostgreSQL
ENV POSTGRES_USER=myuser
ENV POSTGRES_PASSWORD=mypassword
ENV POSTGRES_DB=mydb

# Start Redis server
CMD service redis-server start &

# Start PostgreSQL server
RUN service postgresql start && \
    createuser -U postgres myuser && \
    createdb -U postgres -O myuser mydb

# Copy Nginx configuration
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf

# Start Nginx server
CMD service nginx start &

# Expose ports for all services
EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

# Default command to keep container running
CMD tail -f /dev/null
